lessons.title: Kitchen Safety Basics
lessons.content: Learn the essential safety practices for cooking in the kitchen, including handling knives, avoiding burns, and food safety tips.
objectives: Understand the importance of kitchen safety.

lessons.title: Basic Cooking Techniques
lessons.content: Introduction to basic cooking techniques such as boiling, sautéing, and seasoning. This lesson will cover the fundamental skills needed to prepare simple dishes.
objectives: Learn how to boil water and cook pasta.
Learn how to season food properly.
